description: Inspect the SeisComP SDS waveform archive at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive containing miniSEED data for the GE network. Create a data availability report at /home/ga/data_availability_report.txt featuring a '--- Station Details ---' section with columns for NET, STA, CHA, FILES (count), SIZE_BYTES (total), and DATE_RANGE (earliest and latest day-of-year from filenames in YYYY.DOY-YYYY.DOY format; use the same date twice for single files). Include a '--- Summary ---' section listing 'Total networks', 'Total stations', 'Total channels' (unique codes), 'Total data files', and 'Total data size' in bytes.
